job_description:
We are looking for a Software Engineer to build and maintain scalable web applications and intelligent systems. The ideal candidate should have strong backend fundamentals, hands-on experience with Python-based frameworks, and an understanding of modern web technologies and data-driven solutions.

Responsibilities

Develop and maintain backend services using Python and Flask

Design and integrate REST APIs

Work with SQL/MySQL databases for data storage and retrieval

Build and maintain web interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Collaborate on full-stack features from database to UI

Implement basic machine learning or NLP components when required

Use Git for version control and team collaboration

Write clean, readable, and maintainable code
Required Skills

Python

Flask

SQL / MySQL

REST API development

Git

HTML, CSS, JavaScript

Preferred Skills

Machine Learning

Deep Learning

NLP

Experience building full-stack applications

Understanding of software engineering best practices

Education

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
